creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
After some testing this patch does not seem complete. It's keeping
PORTNAME=fceu-server instead of fceux-server. Changing that is
introducing many more problems with DISTFILE/ETCDIR, etc. The
MASTER_SITE does not have the renamed version either.

I see that the upstream has renamed fceux-server as well inside of the
official fceux distfile.

It seems to me that the emulators/fceux should be updated to 2.2.1 and
then fceux-server just becomes a slave port to that.

-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
bdrewery@freenode/EFNet
